case_title: DUPRE' YADIRA VS SMITH HAROLD et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $840.00 FILED BY DUPRE' YADIRA AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH HAROLD PAN AMERICAN MORTGAGE CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-13-1992 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DUPRE' YADIRA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SMITH HAROLD $840.00 PRINCIPAL, $12.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $852.79 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH HAROLD PAN AMERICAN MORTGAGE CO.
